executiveSummary: Instead of a traditional linear curriculum where subjects are taught in isolation, our program utilizes a Continuous Progressive Model. Students are introduced to all core functional domains right from Semester I. As they progress through the 24-month program, they revisit these exact same domains each semester with increasing complexity, moving from foundational concepts to industry-level execution.

valuePropositions.title: Immediate Holistic Understanding
valuePropositions.description: Students grasp how different facets of Data Science and Real Estate Analytics interconnect from Day 1, rather than waiting until the end of the program to see the 'big picture.'

valuePropositions.title: Reinforced Learning
valuePropositions.description: Rehearsing and building upon the same subjects over four semesters drastically improves retention and practical application.

valuePropositions.title: Job Readiness from the Start
valuePropositions.description: Because training and core engineering are woven into every stage, students develop a continuous portfolio of work rather than a single final project.

semesters.focus: Introducing the core pillars. Focus is on fundamental syntax, basic statistical reasoning, and understanding data structures across Foundations, Core Engineering, Applied Intelligence, and Predictive Modeling.
Transitioning from theory to core execution. Students begin structured programming, data warehousing, and working with larger datasets.
Shifting to automation and deployment. Focus is on machine learning algorithms, NoSQL environments, and predictive logic using Python/R.
Mastery and industry delivery. Deep dives into emerging tech trends, high-level optimization, and the final Predictive Land Value Capstone.
